parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt } ], temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 800 }) }}
